zh.lifeSummary: 當Elinore Hawley於1402年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾格利姆斯比時，她的父親Thomas Hawley15歲，母親Margaret de Brewse27歲。她於1423年與William Copledike of Harington結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1432年在她的家鄉享年30歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elinore Hawley于1402年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾格利姆斯比时，她的父亲Thomas Hawley15岁，母亲Margaret de Brewse27岁。她于1423年与William Copledike of Harington结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1432年在她的家乡享年30岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hawley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a lost place called Hawley in Sheffield (Yorkshire). The placename derives from Old Norse haugr ‘hill, burial mound’ + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: Elinore
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Eleanor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: When Elinore Hawley was born in 1402, in Grimsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Hawley, was 15 and her mother, Margaret de Brewse, was 27. She married William Copledike of Harington in 1423. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died in 1432, in her hometown, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elinore Hawley est née en 1402, à Grimsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Hawley, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Brewse, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé William Copledike of Harington en 1423. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1432, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elinore Hawley 1402 in Grimsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Hawley 15 und ihre Mutter Margaret de Brewse 27. Sie hat 1423 William Copledike of Harington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1432 im Alter von 30 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elinore Hawley è nata il nel 1402 nel Grimsby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas Hawley, aveva 15 anni e sua madre, Margaret de Brewse, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato William Copledike of Harington nel 1423. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1432, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 30 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elinore Hawleyが1402年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアグリムスビーで生まれた時，父Thomas Hawleyは15歳，母Margaret de Brewseは27歳であった。1423年にWilliam Copledike of Haringtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1432年に故郷で30歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elinore Hawley(이)가 1402년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 그림스비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Hawley(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Brewse(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1423년 William Copledike of Harington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1432년 그녀의 고향에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elinore Hawley nasceu em 1402, em Grimsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Hawley, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Brewse, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com William Copledike of Harington em 1423. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1432, em sua cidade natal, com 30 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elinore Hawley родилась в 1402 г. в местности гримсби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Hawley было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Brewse, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Copledike of Harington в 1423 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1432 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 30 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elinore Hawley nació en 1402, en Grimsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Hawley, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Margaret de Brewse, tenía 27 años. Se casó con William Copledike of Harington en 1423. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en 1432, en su pueblo, a la edad de 30 años.
